headlines.description: — Dylan Cease struck out the side in the first inning, combining with 10 relievers on a three-hitter in a show of pitching dominance that led the American League to a 4-0 win over the National League in Tuesday night's All-Star Game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cease, bullpen combine on 3-hitter in AL's 4-0 win, first All-Star shutout since 2013
